    net-mgmt/wifimgr: Update to 1.20

    No changes to actual wifimgr code between 1.19 and 1.20.

    Only changes are:
    - po/Makefile fixes to re-enable build with WITHOUT_NLS
    - wifimgr.desktop.in remove unused MimeTypes variabe

    PR:             263150
